hero.title: Full-Stack Developer with an OPS / DevOps focus
hero.description: Passionate about development, I am constantly driven by designing innovative solutions and continuously improving my technical skills.

about.about_subtitle: Discover my background, skills, and approach to modern software development.
about.career_description: A passionate web developer with over 3 years of experience, I design modern, high-performance, user-centered applications. My growth is driven by continuous technology monitoring and hands-on projects focused on quality, maintainability, and performance.
about.education_degree: Professional Bachelor's Degree — Software Engineering & Databases
about.education_institution: University of Fianarantsoa · National School of Computer Science
about.secondary_institution: Saint-Joseph de Cluny High School, Fianarantsoa

subtitle.s1: Guided by problem-solving and data-driven, I design and develop scalable, reliable, and high-performance digital solutions. Every system, feature, and analysis is crafted with precision.
subtitle.s2: I combine full-stack development and data analysis to deliver robust applications, actionable insights, and measurable results.

s4.title: Testing & Deployment
s4.description: Testing, deploying, and optimizing for real-world use.

project.title: My Projects
project.subtitle: A selection of projects showcasing my expertise in web development and modern application design.
project.auto_flow: Web application enabling intelligent automation of email analysis using AI and custom n8n workflows.
project.planning: Modern web application dedicated to project planning, management, and efficient organization of collaborative meetings.
project.stock_flow: Comprehensive web application designed to manage products, track real-time stock, and streamline inventory operations.
project.project_idea: Do you have a project idea? Let's discuss it!
project.open_to_project: I am always open to discussing new projects and creative ideas. Let's connect and build something amazing together.

experience.title: My Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: Discover my professional journey and the projects I have worked on.

auto_flow.title: Email Analysis Automation via AI and n8n
auto_flow.description: Design and development of a complete solution ensuring reliability and performance. Implementation of a dynamic interface to visualize analyzed emails and integration of data processed by n8n workflows with filtering and organization.

mandika_apk.title: Mobile Application Development - Mandika
mandika_apk.description: Full development of the application including image capture and enhancement. Creation of visualization, editing, and data export interfaces, and implementation of an adaptable OCR engine to extract information according to specifications.

sfyritech_meeting.title: Appointment Management Synchronized with Google Calendar
sfyritech_meeting.description: Design and development of an appointment management application synchronized with Google Calendar. Implementation of a RESTful and WebSocket API for real-time communication and front-end and back-end development for a smooth and responsive user interface.

hello_archi.title: API Development for the Hello Archi Platform
hello_archi.description: Optimization of existing code to improve performance and usability. Development of new features according to client requirements and bug fixes to enhance the user experience.

open_delivery.title: Order and Delivery Management Application
open_delivery.description: Design and development of front-end and back-end aspects of websites and web applications. Implementation of software solutions tailored to client needs and development of custom features according to specifications.

response.r1: I design and develop high-performance, responsive web and mobile applications, combining intuitive front-end with robust back-end. My work covers the entire project lifecycle, from design to production, ensuring an optimal user experience.
response.r2: I combine creativity, ergonomic design, and technical expertise to deliver complete, scalable, and secure solutions, while handling deployment and maintenance using modern DevOps practices.

full_stack.title: Fullstack Web & Mobile Development
full_stack.description: I design and develop high-performance, responsive web and mobile applications. From planning to implementation, I create intuitive interfaces and robust features to deliver an optimal user experience.

designer.title: UI/UX Design
designer.description: I design ergonomic and visually appealing interfaces, combining user research with visual design. My approach ensures every interaction is clear, intuitive, and enjoyable for the user.

ops.title: Ops & Deployment
ops.description: I manage the integration, deployment, and maintenance of applications. Using Docker, CI/CD, and monitoring, I ensure service availability, performance, and security in production.

skill.title: My Skills
skill.subtitle: A clear summary of my technical expertise and the tools I master.

front.title: Front-End Web & Mobile Development
front.subtitle: Design and development of high-performance, responsive, and accessible interfaces for web and mobile applications. Proficient with modern frameworks, UI integration, performance optimization, accessibility, animations, and efficient API consumption.

back.title: Back-End Development
back.subtitle: Architecture and development of secure and scalable back-end services. API design, database management, authentication, performance optimization, testing, integrations, and reliable cloud deployment aligned with business requirements.

ops.title: UI/UX Design & DevOps
ops.subtitle: User-centered design and DevOps practices for reliable delivery. Prototyping, user testing, design systems, automation, CI/CD, security, monitoring, continuous performance improvement, collaboration, quality, scalability, and documentation.

contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.subtitle: I am available for freelance work. Feel free to contact me if you think I could be a good fit for your project.
contact.form_message: I am always open to discussing development projects or collaboration opportunities.
